productDisplayName: Reebok Men Pack of 2 Pirates of the Caribbean Deos
description: Pack of 2 deodorantsStyle NoteStraight from the Sports lifestyle reebok collection of deodorants come these two fabulous deos.The new collection has fashionable motifs of skulls, treasure, mystery and the leading character, Jack Sparrow These fragrant sensations are for men and they come in cylindrical bottlesCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesQuantity: 150 ml each
